nexa.hero.title: One App. Every Connection.
nexa.hero.subtitle: Cloud PBX. Encrypted Chat. Walkie-Talkie. Video Broadcast. Works even without internet.
nexa.footer.desc: The ultimate team communication platform. Walkie-talkie, video, SOS, and AI in one secure app.
nexa.feat.pbx.title: Cloud PBX System
nexa.feat.pbx.desc: A full-featured cloud phone system built into NexaLive. Virtual extensions, IVR menus, SIP trunking, and call recording — no hardware required.
nexa.feat.pbx.1.title: IVR & Auto Attendant
nexa.feat.pbx.1.desc: Multi-level IVR menus with custom greetings. Route calls automatically to the right department or person.
nexa.feat.pbx.2.title: SIP Trunk Gateway
nexa.feat.pbx.2.desc: Connect to landlines and mobile networks via SIP. Make and receive regular phone calls through the app.
nexa.feat.pbx.3.title: Call Recording & CDR
nexa.feat.pbx.3.desc: Every call is recorded and logged. Full Call Detail Records with analytics for quality assurance.
nexa.feat.pbx.4.title: Virtual Extensions
nexa.feat.pbx.4.desc: Create unlimited virtual extensions for teams, departments, or individuals. Works on any device.
nexa.feat.ptt.title: Instant Push-to-Talk
nexa.feat.ptt.desc: Connect instantly with your team using crystal clear HD audio. No waiting for rings, no missed calls. Just press and speak.
nexa.feat.ptt.1.title: Global Coverage
nexa.feat.ptt.1.desc: Works over 3G, 4G, 5G and Wi-Fi across all 7 NexaEdge edge servers worldwide.
nexa.feat.ptt.2.title: Hardware Integration
nexa.feat.ptt.2.desc: Seamlessly integrates with dedicated PTT hardware buttons and Bluetooth headsets.
nexa.feat.ptt.3.title: Voice History
nexa.feat.ptt.3.desc: Never miss a message. Every voice transmission is securely stored and replayable.
nexa.feat.ptt.4.title: Offline Mesh Bluetooth
nexa.feat.ptt.4.desc: Communicate even without internet. Connect with nearby team members using peer-to-peer Bluetooth mesh networking.
nexa.feat.video.title: Live Video PTT
nexa.feat.video.desc: Share exactly what you see. Broadcast live high-definition video to your entire team with a single tap.
nexa.feat.video.1.title: Low Latency
nexa.feat.video.1.desc: Sub-50ms latency powered by WebRTC for true real-time video communication.
nexa.feat.video.2.title: Multi-Viewer Support
nexa.feat.video.2.desc: Hundreds of team members can view the broadcast simultaneously without quality loss.
nexa.feat.sos.title: Emergency SOS & GPS
nexa.feat.sos.desc: Keep your field workers safe. One tap triggers a high-priority alert with live GPS coordinates to the dispatcher.
nexa.feat.sos.1.title: Live Tracking
nexa.feat.sos.1.desc: Continuous GPS tracking during emergencies ensures workers are found quickly.
nexa.feat.sos.2.title: Lone Worker Protection
nexa.feat.sos.2.desc: Automated check-ins. If a worker misses a check-in, an SOS is triggered automatically.
nexa.feat.ai.title: AI Call Analytics
nexa.feat.ai.desc: Transform voice into actionable data. NexaLive AI automatically transcribes and analyzes all team communications. This exclusive feature works with local company PBX systems for performance evaluation and business assessment.
nexa.feat.ai.1.title: Auto-Transcription
nexa.feat.ai.1.desc: Every voice message is accurately transcribed into searchable text.
nexa.feat.ai.2.title: Sentiment Analysis
nexa.feat.ai.2.desc: Detect urgency or stress in voice communications automatically.
nexa.tabs.title: Built for Enterprise
nexa.tabs.subtitle: Powerful tools to manage your entire fleet and operations.
nexa.tabs.erp.title: ERP Integration
nexa.tabs.erp.desc: Connect NexaLive with your existing TexaCore ERP. Sync users, link PTT groups to specific projects, and track communication history within customer files.
nexa.tabs.console.title: Dispatcher Console
nexa.tabs.console.desc: A powerful web-based command center for dispatchers to track users on a live map, manage groups, and broadcast messages to the entire fleet.
nexa.tabs.sip.title: SIP Gateway
nexa.tabs.sip.desc: Bridge the gap between modern PTT and legacy systems. Connect NexaLive to your existing PBX or traditional radio networks via SIP.
nexa.freeplan.title: Free for Individuals. Forever.
nexa.freeplan.desc: Experience the world's most advanced communication platform without spending a dime. No credit card required, no hidden fees.
nexa.compare.title: How We Compare
nexa.compare.subtitle: See why NexaLive is the ultimate choice for enterprise communication.
nexa.pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
nexa.pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you need to connect your enterprise.
nexa.pricing.plan.free.title: Basic
nexa.pricing.plan.pro.title: Pro
nexa.pricing.plan.biz.title: Business
nexa.pricing.plan.ent.title: Enterprise
nexa.security.title: Military-Grade Security & Global Reach
nexa.security.subtitle: Trusted by enterprises worldwide. Built on top of NexaEdge's global edge network for sub-50ms latency.
nexa.security.1.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.security.1.desc: All communications are secured with DTLS-SRTP and AES-256 encryption.
nexa.security.2.title: 7 Global Edge Regions
nexa.security.2.desc: Servers strategically placed worldwide including Saudi Arabia for ultra-low latency.
nexa.security.3.title: Compliance & Privacy
nexa.security.3.desc: Fully compliant with GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, and HIPAA standards.
nexa.security.network.title: NexaEdge Global Network
nexa.download.title: Take NexaLive Everywhere
nexa.download.subtitle: Available natively on all your devices. Seamlessly sync your communications across mobile and desktop.
nexa.usecases.title: Who is NexaLive For?
nexa.usecases.subtitle: Built for teams that need instant, reliable, and secure communication.
nexa.usecases.logistics.title: Transport & Logistics
nexa.usecases.logistics.desc: Keep drivers connected with dispatchers. Share locations, report traffic via PTT, and trigger SOS in emergencies.
nexa.usecases.construction.title: Construction & Engineering
nexa.usecases.construction.desc: Communicate across noisy sites. Use Video PTT to show site progress and Offline Bluetooth Mesh when deep underground.
nexa.usecases.security.title: Security & Private Military
nexa.usecases.security.desc: Military-grade encryption ensures operations are secure. Use lone-worker tracking and dispatcher console for full tactical awareness.
nexa.usecases.retail.title: Retail & Hospitality
nexa.usecases.retail.desc: Coordinate staff instantly without loud overhead PA systems. Connect front-of-house with the warehouse via radio channels.
nexa.pbx.title: NexaPBX Cloud Phone System
nexa.pbx.subtitle: A complete enterprise phone system in the cloud. Extensions, IVR, call routing, SIP trunks — no hardware required.
nexa.pbx.features.title: Everything You Need in a PBX
nexa.pbx.features.subtitle: From basic extensions to advanced call routing, NexaPBX handles it all.
nexa.pbx.feat.extensions.title: Unlimited Extensions
nexa.pbx.feat.extensions.desc: Create extensions for every employee. Each gets a personal softphone, voicemail, and call history.
nexa.pbx.feat.ivr.title: Auto-Attendant (IVR)
nexa.pbx.feat.ivr.desc: Professional multi-level IVR menus with custom greetings, time-based routing, and language selection.
nexa.pbx.feat.ringgroups.title: Ring Groups
nexa.pbx.feat.ringgroups.desc: Route incoming calls to groups of agents. Support ring-all, round-robin, and least-recent strategies.
nexa.pbx.feat.transfer.title: Call Transfer
nexa.pbx.feat.transfer.desc: Blind and attended transfer between extensions. Keep callers informed with hold music.
nexa.pbx.feat.trunks.title: SIP Trunks & PSTN
nexa.pbx.feat.trunks.desc: Connect to any SIP provider or local phone lines via GSM/FXO gateways.
nexa.pbx.feat.callback.title: Click-to-Call & Callback
nexa.pbx.feat.callback.desc: Initiate calls from the app or request automatic callbacks from the IVR queue.
nexa.pbx.feat.softphone.title: Built-in Softphone
nexa.pbx.feat.softphone.desc: Make and receive calls directly from the NexaLive app. No separate phone app needed.
nexa.pbx.feat.bypass.title: Works Where VoIP is Blocked
nexa.pbx.feat.bypass.desc: NexaBridge technology ensures your calls go through even in countries that block VoIP services.
nexa.pbx.feat.routing.title: Smart Call Routing
nexa.pbx.feat.routing.desc: Route calls based on time, caller ID, language, or custom rules. Never miss an important call.
nexa.pbx.feat.timeconditions.title: Time Conditions
nexa.pbx.feat.timeconditions.desc: Set business hours, holidays, and after-hours routing with automatic voicemail fallback.
nexa.pbx.feat.recording.title: Call Recording
nexa.pbx.feat.recording.desc: Record all calls automatically. Search, playback, and download recordings from the dashboard.
nexa.pbx.feat.cdr.title: Call Analytics (CDR)
nexa.pbx.feat.cdr.desc: Detailed call reports with duration, cost, quality metrics, and real-time dashboard.
nexa.pbx.bypass.title: Works Where VoIP is Blocked
nexa.pbx.bypass.subtitle: NexaBridge ensures your communications work in any environment.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point1: Automatic protocol detection and tunneling through restricted networks.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point2: Multiple fallback paths ensure 99.9% call completion rate worldwide.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point3: No manual configuration needed — NexaBridge handles everything automatically.
nexa.pbx.cta.title: Ready to Replace Your Old PBX?
nexa.pbx.cta.desc: Set up your cloud PBX in minutes. No hardware, no contracts, no limits.
nexa.pbx.how.title: How NexaPBX Works
nexa.pbx.how.subtitle: Three steps to a fully operational cloud phone system for your entire organization.
nexa.pbx.how.step1.title: Connect Your Lines
nexa.pbx.how.step1.desc: Bring your existing phone numbers or get new ones. Connect SIP trunks from any provider, or use our global NexaEdge network for instant activation.
nexa.pbx.how.step2.title: Configure Your System
nexa.pbx.how.step2.desc: Set up extensions, IVR menus, ring groups, and call routing from our visual dashboard. No technical expertise required — everything is drag-and-drop.
nexa.pbx.how.step3.title: Start Communicating
nexa.pbx.how.step3.desc: Your team starts making and receiving calls instantly from the NexaLive app on any device. Desktop, mobile, or web — all synced in real-time.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivr.title: IVR Builder & Smart Routing
nexa.pbx.detail.ivr.subtitle: Design professional call flows that guide callers to the right department every time.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.title: Visual IVR Builder
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.desc: Create multi-level interactive voice menus with our drag-and-drop builder. Guide callers through options, collect input, and route intelligently.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p1: Multi-language greetings: record or upload custom messages in Arabic, English, or any language your callers need.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p2: Time-based routing: automatically switch between business hours, after-hours, and holiday menus.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p3: DTMF input collection: let callers enter account numbers, order IDs, or other data before connecting.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p4: Callback queue: when all agents are busy, offer callers the option to receive a callback instead of waiting.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.title: Intelligent Call Distribution
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.desc: Route incoming calls to the right person using rules that match your business logic — ensuring no call goes unanswered.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p1: Round-robin, least-busy, and ring-all strategies for fair workload distribution across your team.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p2: Skills-based routing: direct technical calls to engineers, billing calls to accounting, VIP callers to senior staff.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p3: Overflow rules: if a group doesn't answer within 30 seconds, automatically escalate to the next team or manager.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.title: NexaBridge VoIP Bypass
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.desc: Your business calls must go through — regardless of network restrictions. NexaBridge ensures 99.9% call completion worldwide.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p1: Automatic protocol detection: NexaBridge tests multiple connection methods and selects the fastest available path.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p2: Encrypted tunneling through HTTPS, WebSocket, and proprietary protocols that appear as normal web traffic.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p3: Operates in countries where VoIP is restricted including UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and others — verified and tested.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p4: Zero configuration: employees simply open NexaLive and calls work. No VPN or manual setup needed.
nexa.pbx.detail.analytics.title: Recording & Analytics
nexa.pbx.detail.analytics.subtitle: Every call is a data point. Track quality, performance, and costs in real-time.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.title: Call Recording & Compliance
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.desc: Automatic recording of all calls with secure storage and easy retrieval for training, compliance, and quality assurance.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p1: Configurable recording rules: record all calls, only external calls, or specific extensions and ring groups.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p2: Searchable archive: find any recording by date, caller ID, extension, or call duration.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p3: Encrypted storage with role-based access — only authorized managers can listen to recordings.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.title: Real-Time Dashboard & CDR
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.desc: Monitor your phone system performance with live dashboards showing call volumes, wait times, and agent productivity.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p1: Live wallboard: see active calls, queue depth, average hold time, and agent availability at a glance.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p2: Detailed call records with duration, cost tracking, quality scores, and caller satisfaction metrics.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p3: Exportable reports in PDF and CSV for management review and regulatory compliance.
nexa.pbx.detail.erp.title: Integration & Deployment
nexa.pbx.detail.erp.subtitle: NexaPBX connects with your existing business systems and scales with your organization.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.title: ERP & CRM Integration
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.desc: Connect NexaPBX to your business systems for click-to-call, automatic call logging, and caller identification.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p1: TexaCore ERP native integration: caller pop-up shows customer name, balance, and recent orders before you pick up.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p2: API and webhooks for integration with any CRM, helpdesk, or custom application your business uses.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p3: Automatic call logging: every call is recorded in your CRM with duration, notes, and outcome.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.title: Flexible Deployment
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.desc: Choose the deployment model that fits your security and compliance requirements.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p1: Cloud-hosted: zero maintenance, automatic updates, and global redundancy across NexaEdge servers.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p2: On-premise option: deploy NexaPBX on your own servers for maximum data sovereignty and control.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p3: Hybrid mode: cloud for external calls, on-premise for internal — the best of both worlds.
nexa.ptt.title: Instant Team Communication
nexa.ptt.subtitle: Press and speak. Crystal clear HD audio reaches your entire team in milliseconds. No ringing, no waiting.
nexa.ptt.features.title: PTT Features
nexa.ptt.features.subtitle: Built for teams that need instant, reliable voice communication.
nexa.ptt.feat.hd.title: HD Audio
nexa.ptt.feat.hd.desc: NexaVoice proprietary codec delivers crystal clear voice quality in any network condition.
nexa.ptt.feat.global.title: Global Edge Network
nexa.ptt.feat.global.desc: 7 NexaEdge servers worldwide ensure sub-100ms latency everywhere.
nexa.ptt.feat.channels.title: Smart Channels
nexa.ptt.feat.channels.desc: Organize teams into channels. Join multiple channels, switch with one tap.
nexa.ptt.feat.priority.title: Priority Speaker
nexa.ptt.feat.priority.desc: Managers can override active transmissions for urgent announcements.
nexa.ptt.feat.history.title: Voice History
nexa.ptt.feat.history.desc: Every transmission is stored and replayable. Never miss a message.
nexa.ptt.feat.hardware.title: Hardware PTT Buttons
nexa.ptt.feat.hardware.desc: Works with dedicated PTT accessories, Bluetooth headsets, and wired earpieces.
nexa.ptt.feat.video.title: Video PTT
nexa.ptt.feat.video.desc: Swipe up to broadcast live video. World's first video push-to-talk.
nexa.ptt.feat.mesh.title: Offline Mesh
nexa.ptt.feat.mesh.desc: Continue communicating via Bluetooth mesh when internet is unavailable.
nexa.ptt.feat.encrypted.title: Encrypted Channels
nexa.ptt.feat.encrypted.desc: All voice transmissions are encrypted end-to-end with AES-256.
nexa.ptt.cta.title: Replace Your Radios with NexaPTT
nexa.ptt.cta.desc: Unlimited range, free for individuals, enterprise-ready.
nexa.ptt.detail.audio.title: NexaVoice Audio Engine
nexa.ptt.detail.audio.subtitle: Purpose-built audio technology for professional team communication.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.title: NexaVoice HD Codec
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.desc: Our proprietary audio engine adapts in real-time to deliver crystal clear voice in any network condition — from 2G to 5G.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p1: Adaptive bitrate: automatically adjusts from 8kbps to 128kbps based on available bandwidth.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p2: AI-powered noise cancellation removes background noise from construction sites, vehicles, and crowded environments.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p3: Sub-200ms end-to-end latency — faster than traditional two-way radios.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p4: Automatic echo cancellation and voice activity detection for hands-free operation.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.title: Video Push-to-Talk
nexa.ptt.detail.video.desc: World's first video PTT system. Swipe up while transmitting to broadcast live video to your entire channel.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p1: One-to-many live video broadcast — show what you see to your entire team instantly.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p2: Automatic quality adjustment: 1080p on Wi-Fi, optimized for cellular in the field.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p3: Video recordings are stored and can be replayed, annotated, and shared.
nexa.ptt.sos.title: SOS & Emergency System
nexa.ptt.sos.subtitle: Comprehensive emergency features designed to protect your team in critical situations.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.title: Instant SOS Alerts
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.desc: One-touch emergency activation sends immediate alerts to all designated responders with full context.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p1: Dedicated SOS button — works even from lock screen or with screen off.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p2: Automatic audio recording begins immediately when SOS is triggered.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p3: Alerts include real-time GPS coordinates, battery level, and network status.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p4: Configurable escalation chain: if first responder doesn't acknowledge, alert escalates automatically.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.title: GPS Live Tracking
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.desc: Real-time location tracking for field teams with full movement history.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p1: Live map view showing all team members' positions updated every 5 seconds.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p2: Geofencing: automatic alerts when team members enter or leave designated zones.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p3: Movement history and route replay for incident investigation.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.title: Lone Worker Protection
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.desc: Automated safety monitoring for employees working alone in hazardous environments.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p1: Timed check-in: if worker doesn't respond within set interval, automatic SOS is triggered.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p2: Man-down detection: uses accelerometer to detect falls or sudden impacts.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p3: No-movement alert: triggers if device remains stationary for too long.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.title: Dispatcher Console
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.desc: Centralized command center for managing teams, alerts, and emergencies from a web dashboard.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p1: Real-time overview of all active channels, team positions, and SOS alerts.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p2: One-click broadcast to all channels or specific groups.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p3: Full incident log with timestamps, audio recordings, and GPS data.
nexa.ptt.detail.channels.title: Channels & Offline Network
nexa.ptt.detail.channels.subtitle: Organize your teams and stay connected even without internet.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.title: Smart Channel Management
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.desc: Organize your organization into logical communication groups with fine-grained access control.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p1: Unlimited channels per organization. Users can monitor multiple channels simultaneously.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p2: Priority levels: emergency channels always override normal channels.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p3: Temporary channels for ad-hoc teams — automatically expire after the mission.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.title: Offline Bluetooth Mesh
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.desc: When internet is unavailable, NexaMesh creates a local Bluetooth network for continued communication.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p1: Automatic mesh formation — devices discover each other and create relay chains.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p2: Multi-hop routing extends range far beyond single Bluetooth connection.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p3: Messages queue locally and sync automatically when internet connection is restored.
nexa.msg.title: Secure Messaging, Zero Compromise
nexa.msg.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted messaging with file sharing, groups, and cross-platform sync.
nexa.msg.features.title: Messaging Features
nexa.msg.features.subtitle: Everything you need for secure team communication.
nexa.msg.feat.e2e.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.msg.feat.e2e.desc: Every message is encrypted before leaving your device. Nobody can read your messages — not even us.
nexa.msg.feat.groups.title: Group Conversations
nexa.msg.feat.groups.desc: Create groups for teams, projects, or departments. Admin controls and member management.
nexa.msg.feat.files.title: File Sharing
nexa.msg.feat.files.desc: Share documents, PDFs, and files securely. All attachments are encrypted in transit and at rest.
nexa.msg.feat.media.title: Photos & Media
nexa.msg.feat.media.desc: Send photos, videos, and voice messages with the same encryption protection.
nexa.msg.feat.search.title: Message Search
nexa.msg.feat.search.desc: Search through your message history locally on your device. Server never sees your content.
nexa.msg.feat.disappearing.title: Disappearing Messages
nexa.msg.feat.disappearing.desc: Set messages to auto-delete after a specified time. Extra privacy when needed.
nexa.msg.feat.notifications.title: Smart Notifications
nexa.msg.feat.notifications.desc: Priority-based notifications. Urgent messages always get through, routine ones can wait.
nexa.msg.feat.crossplatform.title: Cross-Platform
nexa.msg.feat.crossplatform.desc: Seamlessly sync across iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and web.
nexa.msg.feat.sync.title: Real-Time Sync
nexa.msg.feat.sync.desc: Messages appear instantly across all your devices. Edit or delete from anywhere.
nexa.msg.enc.title: Multi-Layer Encryption
nexa.msg.enc.subtitle: Three layers of protection for your conversations.
nexa.msg.enc.point1: Messages are encrypted on your device before transmission using the Signal Protocol.
nexa.msg.enc.point2: Our servers never have access to your encryption keys or message content.
nexa.msg.enc.point3: Forward secrecy ensures past messages stay secure even if keys are compromised.
nexa.msg.enc.point4: Regular independent security audits verify our encryption implementation.
nexa.msg.cta.title: Start Messaging Securely
nexa.msg.cta.desc: Free encrypted messaging for individuals. Enterprise plans for teams.
nexa.msg.detail.protocol.title: Encryption Protocol & Architecture
nexa.msg.detail.protocol.subtitle: Understanding the technology that makes your messages truly private.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.title: Signal Protocol Implementation
nexa.msg.detail.signal.desc: NexaLive implements the Signal protocol — the same battle-tested encryption used by the world's most secure messengers, independently audited and open-source verified.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p1: Double Ratchet algorithm: each message uses a unique encryption key, so compromising one message doesn't expose any others.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p2: Forward secrecy: past messages remain encrypted even if your device is compromised in the future.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p3: Keys are generated and stored exclusively on your device — they never leave your phone or computer.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p4: Verified contact identity: QR code verification ensures you're communicating with the right person, not an impersonator.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.title: Encrypted Data Storage
nexa.msg.detail.storage.desc: Your messages and files are encrypted at rest on our servers. Even in the unlikely event of a server breach, your data remains completely unreadable.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p1: AES-256 encryption at rest for all stored messages, files, and media on NexaEdge servers.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p2: Automatic message expiration: set messages to self-destruct after a configurable time period.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p3: Complete data deletion: when you delete a message, it's permanently removed from all servers — not just hidden.
nexa.msg.detail.team.title: Team Collaboration & Management
nexa.msg.detail.team.subtitle: Enterprise-grade team management without sacrificing security.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.title: Admin Controls & Compliance
nexa.msg.detail.admin.desc: Give IT administrators the tools they need to manage corporate messaging while maintaining end-to-end encryption.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p1: User provisioning: automatically create accounts for new employees and revoke access when they leave.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p2: Data retention policies: configure how long messages are stored to comply with industry regulations.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p3: Audit logs: track account creation, device registration, and security events without accessing message content.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.title: Seamless Cross-Device Sync
nexa.msg.detail.sync.desc: Start a conversation on your phone, continue on your laptop, finish on your tablet — all in real-time with full message history.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p1: Up to 5 devices per account, each with its own encryption keys for maximum security.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p2: Offline-first: compose and read messages without internet. They sync automatically when you reconnect.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p3: Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and web browser — with native apps for each platform.
nexa.sec.title: Security Without Compromise
nexa.sec.subtitle: Military-grade encryption protects every call, message, and file. Zero-knowledge architecture means we can't access your data — even if we wanted to.
nexa.sec.features.title: Security Architecture
nexa.sec.features.subtitle: Built from the ground up with security as the foundation.
nexa.sec.feat.e2e.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.sec.feat.e2e.desc: All communications encrypted with AES-256. Only sender and recipient can decrypt.
nexa.sec.feat.zero.title: Zero-Knowledge
nexa.sec.feat.zero.desc: Our servers never have access to your encryption keys or unencrypted data.
nexa.sec.feat.keys.title: On-Device Key Management
nexa.sec.feat.keys.desc: Encryption keys are generated and stored exclusively on your device.
nexa.sec.feat.infra.title: Secure Infrastructure
nexa.sec.feat.infra.desc: 7 NexaEdge servers in SOC 2 certified data centers worldwide.
nexa.sec.feat.auth.title: Biometric Authentication
nexa.sec.feat.auth.desc: Face ID, fingerprint, and PIN protection for app access.
nexa.sec.feat.bypass.title: Censorship Resistance
nexa.sec.feat.bypass.desc: NexaBridge technology ensures communication works where VoIP is blocked.
nexa.sec.compare.title: How We Compare
nexa.sec.compare.subtitle: NexaLive vs other messaging platforms.
nexa.sec.cta.title: Security You Can Trust
nexa.sec.cta.desc: Download NexaLive and communicate with confidence.
nexa.sec.detail.zk.title: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
nexa.sec.detail.zk.subtitle: We designed NexaLive so that we physically cannot access your data — even under legal compulsion.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.title: How Zero-Knowledge Works
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.desc: Our servers relay encrypted data between devices but never have the ability to decrypt it. This isn't a policy — it's a mathematical guarantee.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p1: Messages are encrypted on your device using keys that exist only on your device. Our servers see only encrypted blobs.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p2: Voice and video calls use DTLS-SRTP encryption negotiated directly between devices — our servers only relay encrypted media.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p3: File transfers are encrypted with unique per-file keys. Even stored files on our CDN are unreadable without your device keys.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p4: Account metadata is minimized: we don't store your contacts, call history, or message timestamps on our servers.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.title: On-Device Key Management
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.desc: Encryption keys are generated, stored, and managed exclusively on your device — never uploaded to any server.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p1: Identity keys are generated during registration using cryptographically secure random number generators.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p2: Session keys rotate with every message using the Double Ratchet algorithm for forward and backward secrecy.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p3: Key backup is optional and encrypted with a user-chosen passphrase before leaving the device.
nexa.sec.detail.compliance.title: Compliance & Certifications
nexa.sec.detail.compliance.subtitle: Meeting the strictest industry standards for data protection and privacy.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.title: Industry Standards
nexa.sec.detail.standards.desc: NexaLive meets and exceeds the security requirements of the most demanding industries worldwide.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p1: GDPR compliant: full data subject rights including right to deletion, portability, and access across all EU data centers.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p2: SOC 2 Type II certified: independent verification of security controls, availability, and confidentiality.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p3: HIPAA compatible: encrypted communication suitable for healthcare providers handling protected health information.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.title: Security Audits & Transparency
nexa.sec.detail.audit.desc: Regular independent audits ensure our encryption implementation matches our security claims.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p1: Annual penetration testing by independent security firms with published remediation timelines.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p2: Vulnerability disclosure program: security researchers can report issues through our responsible disclosure process.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p3: Transparency report published quarterly: disclosure of government requests and our responses.
nexa.mesh.title: NexaMesh: No Internet? No Problem.
nexa.mesh.subtitle: Communicate with nearby team members using Bluetooth mesh networking. No internet, no cell signal, no problem.
nexa.mesh.how.title: How NexaMesh Works
nexa.mesh.how.subtitle: Three simple steps to communicate without internet.
nexa.mesh.step1.title: Discover
nexa.mesh.step1.desc: NexaLive automatically discovers nearby devices using Bluetooth Low Energy.
nexa.mesh.step2.title: Connect
nexa.mesh.step2.desc: Devices form a peer-to-peer mesh network. Each device acts as a relay node.
nexa.mesh.step3.title: Communicate
nexa.mesh.step3.desc: Send voice messages and texts through the mesh. Multi-hop extends the range.
nexa.mesh.use.title: Use Cases
nexa.mesh.use.subtitle: NexaMesh shines where traditional networks fail.
nexa.mesh.use.underground.title: Underground & Tunnels
nexa.mesh.use.underground.desc: Construction sites, mines, and basements where cell signal cannot reach.
nexa.mesh.use.remote.title: Remote Areas
nexa.mesh.use.remote.desc: Mountains, deserts, and rural areas without cell coverage.
nexa.mesh.use.emergency.title: Emergency & Disaster
nexa.mesh.use.emergency.desc: When cell towers are down after natural disasters or emergencies.
nexa.mesh.use.events.title: Crowded Events
nexa.mesh.use.events.desc: Concerts, stadiums, and events where networks are overloaded.
nexa.mesh.specs.title: Technical Specifications
nexa.mesh.cta.title: Communication Without Limits
nexa.mesh.cta.desc: NexaMesh is built into every NexaLive app. No extra hardware needed.
nexa.mesh.detail.tech.title: Mesh Technology Deep Dive
nexa.mesh.detail.tech.subtitle: Understanding the technology that keeps your team connected without infrastructure.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.title: Multi-Hop Routing
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.desc: Messages travel across multiple devices to reach their destination, extending range far beyond a single Bluetooth connection.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p1: Automatic route discovery: the network finds the optimal path between any two devices in real-time.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p2: Each hop extends range by ~100 meters. With 10 devices in chain, reach exceeds 1 kilometer.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p3: Store-and-forward: if the destination is unreachable, messages queue and deliver when the recipient comes in range.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.title: Self-Healing Network
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.desc: When devices leave or join the network, NexaMesh automatically reconfigures routes to maintain connectivity.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p1: If a relay device goes offline, traffic automatically reroutes through alternative paths within seconds.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p2: New devices joining the network are automatically discovered and integrated as potential relay nodes.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p3: Battery-aware routing: the network avoids routing through low-battery devices to prevent unexpected disconnections.
nexa.mesh.detail.scenarios.title: Real-World Scenarios
nexa.mesh.detail.scenarios.subtitle: Critical situations where NexaMesh makes the difference between connected and isolated.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.title: Disaster Recovery & Emergencies
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.desc: When cell towers go down during natural disasters, NexaMesh ensures emergency teams maintain communication.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p1: First responders maintain PTT communication when cellular infrastructure is destroyed or overloaded.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p2: SOS alerts with GPS coordinates propagate through the mesh even without any internet connectivity.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p3: All mesh communication remains encrypted — security is never compromised even in emergency mode.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.title: Industrial & Underground Sites
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.desc: Maintain team communication in environments where cellular signals cannot penetrate.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p1: Underground mines, tunnels, and basements where no cellular signal exists.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p2: Steel-reinforced concrete buildings that block radio signals — common in factories and warehouses.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p3: Remote construction sites and oil fields with no cellular coverage for kilometers.

nexa.solutions.subtitle: NexaLive adapts to the specific communication needs of your industry.

nexa.solutions.industries.subtitle: Select your industry to see how NexaLive fits your workflow.

nexa.solutions.emergency.title: Emergency Services
nexa.solutions.emergency.desc: Mesh networking when infrastructure is down, SOS with GPS, video broadcast.
nexa.solutions.offices.title: Corporate Offices

nexa.solutions.business.title: Commercial Business

nexa.solutions.ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
nexa.solutions.ecommerce.desc: Smart IVR, local & international numbers, call center analytics for online stores.
nexa.solutions.callcenters.title: Call Centers
nexa.solutions.callcenters.desc: Smart ACD, Callback features, and advanced supervisor dashboards.
nexa.solutions.government.title: Government
nexa.solutions.government.desc: Secure on-premise hosting, E2E encryption, and citizen IVR.
nexa.solutions.banks.title: Banking & Finance
nexa.solutions.banks.desc: Direct Inward Dialing for VIPs, compliance recording, and secure chat.
nexa.solutions.police.title: Police & Public Safety
nexa.solutions.police.desc: Tactical PTT, Video PTT, GPS tracking, and SOS dispatching.
nexa.solutions.fieldteams.title: Field Teams
nexa.solutions.fieldteams.desc: Mesh networking without internet, low battery usage PTT, and GPS routing.
nexa.solutions.cta.title: Find Your Solution
nexa.solutions.cta.desc: Contact us for a custom communication plan tailored to your industry.
nexa.sos.title: SOS & Lone Worker Protection
nexa.sos.subtitle: Comprehensive emergency features designed to protect your field team in critical situations. Real-time GPS tracking, automated alerts, and instant dispatcher connectivity.
nexa.sos.features.title: Lifesaving Features
nexa.sos.features.subtitle: Every second counts in an emergency. NexaLive is built to act fast.
nexa.sos.feat.instant.title: Instant SOS Activation
nexa.sos.feat.instant.desc: One-touch emergency trigger overrides the screen lock and instantly alerts the control center.
nexa.sos.feat.gps.title: Live GPS Tracking
nexa.sos.feat.gps.desc: Real-time location updates every 5 seconds during an active SOS.
nexa.sos.feat.audio.title: Auto-Ambient Audio
nexa.sos.feat.audio.desc: Automatically opens the microphone to record and transmit ambient sound to dispatchers.
nexa.sos.feat.lone.title: Lone Worker Monitoring
nexa.sos.feat.lone.desc: Automated check-ins and man-down detection for employees working alone in hazardous areas.
nexa.sos.feat.escalate.title: Smart Escalation
nexa.sos.feat.escalate.desc: If an alert isn't acknowledged, it automatically escalates up the chain of command.
nexa.sos.feat.stealth.title: Stealth Mode
nexa.sos.feat.stealth.desc: Trigger SOS silently without visual or audio cues during hostage or active threat situations.
nexa.sos.detail.loneworker.title: Lone Worker Protection
nexa.sos.detail.loneworker.subtitle: Automated safety monitoring for employees working alone in hazardous environments.
nexa.sos.detail.mandown.title: Man-Down Detection
nexa.sos.detail.mandown.desc: Utilizes the device's accelerometer and gyroscope to detect falls or sudden impacts. If the user doesn't respond to the pre-alert, an SOS is triggered automatically.
nexa.sos.detail.mandown.p1: Adjustable sensitivity for different work environments (construction vs office).
nexa.sos.detail.mandown.p2: 10-second pre-alert warning allows the user to cancel false alarms.
nexa.sos.detail.mandown.p3: Detects changes in angle (e.g., worker falls horizontally) and sudden impacts.
nexa.sos.detail.checkin.title: Timed Check-In (Dead Man's Switch)
nexa.sos.detail.checkin.desc: Requires the worker to acknowledge a prompt at predefined intervals. Failure to acknowledge triggers a full emergency protocol.
nexa.sos.detail.checkin.p1: Customizable intervals ranging from 15 minutes to 4 hours.
nexa.sos.detail.checkin.p2: Automated push notifications remind workers to check in.
nexa.sos.detail.checkin.p3: Visual and audible escalation if check-in is missed before triggering SOS.
nexa.sos.detail.nomovement.title: No-Movement Alarm
nexa.sos.detail.nomovement.desc: Triggers if the device remains completely stationary for an extended period, indicating the worker may be unconscious.
nexa.sos.dispatch.title: Dispatcher Command Center
nexa.sos.dispatch.subtitle: Total situational awareness for your emergency response team.
nexa.sos.dispatch.map.title: Interactive Live Map
nexa.sos.dispatch.map.desc: Track your entire fleet in real-time. When an SOS is triggered, the map immediately centers on the incident with a flashing red indicator and route plotting.
nexa.sos.dispatch.log.title: Immutable Audit Trail
nexa.sos.dispatch.log.desc: Every SOS event is logged with GPS coordinates, timestamps, and audio recordings. Reports can be exported for insurance or legal compliance.
nexa.sos.cta.title: Protect Your Most Valuable Asset
nexa.sos.cta.desc: Ensure your team comes home safe every day. Deploy NexaLive's SOS system today.
nexa.biz.title: Transform Your Workforce
nexa.biz.subtitle: The ultimate control center for your company. Seamless ERP integration, AI analytics, global roaming, and advanced fleet management—all in one platform.
nexa.biz.feat.roaming.title: Global Free Roaming
nexa.biz.feat.roaming.desc: Receive and make local PBX calls anywhere in the world for free using the NexaLive app. Eliminate international roaming charges entirely.
nexa.biz.feat.dispatch.title: Dispatcher & Fleet Control
nexa.biz.feat.dispatch.desc: Track drivers, manage field personnel, and coordinate teams via a unified command center with live GPS and SOS mapping.
nexa.biz.feat.erp.title: TexaCore ERP Integration
nexa.biz.feat.erp.desc: Deep sync with your CRM. Caller ID pop-ups with customer data before you answer, and auto-logged call histories.
nexa.biz.feat.ai.title: Smart AI Analytics
nexa.biz.feat.ai.desc: Auto-transcription of calls, sentiment analysis for customer satisfaction, and intelligent reporting to drive business growth.
nexa.biz.feat.pbx.title: Advanced Cloud PBX
nexa.biz.feat.pbx.desc: Full control over routing, smart IVR, and instant extension management directly from the dashboard.
nexa.biz.feat.click2call.title: Instant Click-to-Call
nexa.biz.feat.click2call.desc: Embed click-to-call on your website. Connect instantly with customers or trigger a 'Call Me Back' within 30 seconds to never lose a lead.
nexa.biz.section.erp.title: Never Lose a Customer
nexa.biz.section.erp.subtitle: Effective Customer & Meeting Management
nexa.biz.section.erp.p1: When a customer calls, their complete CRM profile and history instantly pop up on your screen. You’re always prepared.
nexa.biz.section.erp.p2: Schedule, manage, and record secure video meetings directly linked to customer accounts.
nexa.biz.cta.title: Elevate Your Business Locally & Globally
nexa.biz.cta.desc: Upgrade to NexaLive For Business and experience unparalleled control and communication efficiency.
nexa.biz.hero.mgmt.title: Ultimate Business Control
nexa.biz.hero.mgmt.subtitle: Manage operations, remote teams, and global communications from a single unified dashboard.
nexa.biz.hero.ai.title: AI-Powered Analytics
nexa.biz.hero.ai.subtitle: Your smart analytics are the benchmark of your success. Transform conversations into valuable data with live auto-transcription and instant sentiment analysis.
nexa.biz.hero.crm.title: TexaCore ERP Integration
nexa.biz.hero.crm.subtitle: Deep CRM synchronization. Caller ID pop-ups with full customer history appear before you even answer.
nexa.biz.hero.call.title: Instant Click-to-Call
nexa.biz.hero.call.subtitle: Embed one-click calling on your website. Guarantee a callback within 30 seconds to capture every lead.
nexa.showcase.mashup.title: One App. All Communications.
nexa.showcase.mashup.subtitle: Cloud PBX. Encrypted Chats. Push-to-Talk. Live Video. Works even without internet.
nexa.showcase.mesh.title: Works Without Internet
nexa.showcase.mesh.subtitle: Local Mesh network via Bluetooth. Communicate in basements, warehouses, and remote sites. No infrastructure needed.
nexa.showcase.military-security.title: Military-Grade Security
nexa.showcase.military-security.subtitle: Maximum protection built on three layers of encryption. Zero-trust infrastructure ensuring your communications and data remain completely hack-proof.
nexa.showcase.pbx.title: Cloud PBX System
nexa.showcase.pbx.subtitle: One number for your business with smart multilingual IVR. Automatic call distribution across departments. Local numbers in 7+ countries for global presence.
nexa.showcase.ptt.title: Push-to-Talk — Instantly
nexa.showcase.ptt.subtitle: Instant voice communication across teams. Dedicated channels per department. Faster than a call, faster than a message.
nexa.showcase.encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.showcase.encryption.subtitle: Every call, message, and file encrypted with AES-256. Nobody can access your data — not even us. Military-grade security.
nexa.showcase.video.title: Live Video Streaming
nexa.showcase.video.subtitle: Live video from any location. Remote site monitoring. Screen sharing in meetings. Document incidents with audio and video.
nexa.showcase.sos.title: Emergency SOS System
nexa.showcase.sos.subtitle: Emergency button sends instant alert with GPS to the entire team. 3 levels: help, danger, medical. Automatic lone worker protection.

nexa.pbx.ivrdemo.subtitle: Naciśnij odtwórz, aby doświadczyć naszego profesjonalnego systemu IVR. Dostępny w 11 językach.

nexa.ui.texacore_solutions_is_a_global: TexaCore Solutions to globalna firma technologiczna specjalizująca się w inteligentnych rozwiązaniach komunikacyjnych dla przedsiębiorstw. Dostarczamy zintegrowaną platformę NexaLive, która łączy Cloud PBX, Push-to-Talk i szyfrowane wiadomości w jedną ujednoliconą platformę.
nexa.ui.empower_organizations_worldwid: Zapewnij organizacjom na całym świecie skuteczną i bezpieczną komunikację dzięki zaawansowanym, zintegrowanym technologiom komunikacyjnym. Staramy się, aby każdy zespół — zarówno w biurze, jak i w terenie — był zawsze połączony, bezpieczny i produktywny.
nexa.ui.to_become_the_world_s_leading: Stać się wiodącą na świecie platformą zunifikowanej komunikacji korporacyjnej, w której głos, wideo, przesyłanie wiadomości i sztuczna inteligencja łączą się w jedno płynne, bezpieczne doświadczenie, które działa w dowolnym miejscu i czasie.
nexa.ui.nexalive_platform_delivers_eve: Platforma NexaLive zapewnia wszystko, czego potrzebuje Twoje przedsiębiorstwo w jednym ekosystemie
nexa.ui.from_an_idea_to_a_global_commu: Od pomysłu do globalnej platformy komunikacji
nexa.ui.the_principles_that_guide_ever: Zasady, którymi kierujemy się we wszystkim, co robimy
nexa.ui.globally_distributed_infrastru: Globalnie rozproszona infrastruktura zapewniająca najwyższą wydajność i bezpieczeństwo
nexa.ui.operating_from_the_heart_of_eu: Działamy z serca Europy, aby służyć naszym klientom na całym świecie
nexa.ui.designed_for_creativity_and_in: Zaprojektowany z myślą o kreatywności i innowacyjności
nexa.ui.join_thousands_of_enterprises_1: Dołącz do tysięcy przedsiębiorstw, które ufają NexaLive w codziennej komunikacji
nexa.ui.texacore_erp_customer_crm: TexaCore ERP i CRM dla klientów
nexa.ui.instant_caller_id_pop_ups_from: Natychmiastowe wyskakujące okienka z identyfikatorem dzwoniącego z bazy danych
nexa.ui.call_logs_automatically_attach: Dzienniki połączeń są automatycznie dołączane do akt klienta
nexa.ui.secure_video_meetings_linked_t: Bezpieczne spotkania wideo powiązane z kontami klientów
nexa.ui.automated_check_ins_if_a_worke: Automatyczne meldowanie. Jeśli pracownik nie stawi się na odprawę, funkcja SOS zostanie uruchomiona automatycznie
nexa.ui.multi_level_voice_menus_with_t: Wielopoziomowe menu głosowe z routingiem opartym na czasie i języku
nexa.ui.auto_record_all_calls_with_sea: Automatyczne nagrywanie wszystkich połączeń z możliwością wyszukiwania odtwarzania z poziomu deski rozdzielczej
nexa.ui.works_where_voip_is_blocked: Działa tam, gdzie VoIP jest zablokowany
nexa.ui.nexabridge_ensures_calls_go_th: NexaBridge zapewnia realizację połączeń nawet w krajach z ograniczeniami VoIP
nexa.ui.live_dashboard_with_detailed_c: Pulpit na żywo ze szczegółowymi raportami dotyczącymi połączeń, wydajności i kosztów
nexa.ui.click_any_feature_to_explore_i: Kliknij dowolną funkcję, aby poznać jej pełne szczegóły
nexa.ui.join_thousands_of_companies_re: Dołącz do tysięcy firm korzystających z NexaLive.
nexa.ui.full_cloud_pbx_with_smart_ivr: Pełna centrala PBX w chmurze z inteligentnym IVR, automatyczną dystrybucją połączeń i numerami lokalnymi w ponad 50 krajach. Pełna kontrola z panelu administracyjnego.
nexa.ui.instant_push_to_talk_with_live: Natychmiastowa funkcja „naciśnij i mów” ze śledzeniem GPS na żywo i mapami w czasie rzeczywistym. Doskonale sprawdza się w logistyce, transporcie i budownictwie.
nexa.ui.end_to_end_encryption_off_grid: Kompleksowe szyfrowanie, sieć Mesh poza siecią, automatyczne SOS z GPS i ochrona samotnych pracowników.
nexa.ui.ai_call_analytics_automatic_tr: Analiza połączeń AI, automatyczna transkrypcja, szczegółowe raporty wydajności i zaawansowane pulpity statystyczne.
nexa.ui.use_nexalive_on_your_computer: Korzystaj z NexaLive na swoim komputerze
nexa.ui.scan_the_qr_code_from_nexalive: Aby rozpocząć, zeskanuj kod QR z aplikacji NexaLive na swoim telefonie
nexa.ui.we_provide_a_complete_range_of: Dostarczamy pełną gamę sprzętu w pełni kompatybilnego z naszą centralą Cloud PBX, zapewniając najwyższą jakość i niezawodność dla Twojego biznesu.

nexa.hardware.ip_phones.desc: Telefony stacjonarne – od podstawowych po zaawansowane modele wideo.

nexa.hardware.gateways.desc: Połącz tradycyjne linie (FXO/FXS) i sieci komórkowe (SIM).
nexa.hardware.headsets.title: Zestawy słuchawkowe
nexa.hardware.headsets.desc: Profesjonalne zestawy słuchawkowe z aktywną redukcją szumów dla call center.

nexa.features.item_12.title: Analityka AI
nexa.features.item_13.desc: System telefoniczny w chmurze klasy korporacyjnej — profesjonalna centrala PBX z inteligentnym IVR, automatyczną dystrybucją połączeń (ACD), nagrywaniem rozmów i numerami lokalnymi w ponad 50 krajach.
nexa.features.item_14.desc: Natychmiastowa komunikacja głosowa jak przez krótkofalówkę, ale nieograniczona — połącz się ze swoim zespołem w dowolnym miejscu na świecie za pomocą jednego naciśnięcia przycisku i śledzenia GPS na żywo.
nexa.features.item_15.desc: Transmisja wideo na żywo z pola do centrum sterowania — zobacz, co widzi Twój zespół w czasie rzeczywistym, z pełnym szyfrowaniem.
nexa.features.item_16.desc: Kompleksowo szyfrowane wiadomości błyskawiczne — wysyłaj SMS-y, zdjęcia, pliki i lokalizacje z gwarancją całkowitej prywatności.
nexa.features.item_17.desc: Szyfrowanie AES-256 na poziomie wojskowym z architekturą zerowej wiedzy — nikt nie ma dostępu do Twoich danych, nawet my.
nexa.features.item_18.desc: Komunikacja offline za pośrednictwem sieci Bluetooth Mesh — łącz się ze swoim zespołem nawet w odizolowanych obszarach bez żadnej infrastruktury.
nexa.features.item_19.desc: Kompletny system alarmowy z natychmiastowymi alertami GPS — wysyła automatyczny sygnał o niebezpieczeństwie z dokładną lokalizacją do centrum kontroli.
nexa.features.item_20.desc: Sztuczna inteligencja analizująca całą komunikację Twojego zespołu — automatyczna transkrypcja, analiza nastrojów i inteligentne raporty wydajności.
nexa.features.item_21.subtitle: Pełna centrala PBX w chmurze z inteligentnym IVR, automatyczną dystrybucją połączeń i numerami lokalnymi w ponad 50 krajach.
nexa.features.item_22.subtitle: Natychmiastowa funkcja „naciśnij i mów” ze śledzeniem GPS na żywo i mapami w czasie rzeczywistym. Idealny dla drużyn terenowych.
nexa.features.item_23.subtitle: Kompleksowe szyfrowanie AES-256 w architekturze o zerowej wiedzy — nikt nie ma dostępu do Twoich danych, nawet my.
nexa.features.item_24.subtitle: Połącz się ze swoim zespołem nawet w odizolowanych obszarach, bez żadnej infrastruktury ani połączenia internetowego.

nexa.solutions_hero.item_5.subtitle: Natychmiastowa komunikacja między liniami produkcyjnymi a centrami kontroli dzięki śledzeniu pracowników i inteligentnym systemom awaryjnym.
nexa.solutions_hero.item_6.subtitle: Sieć offline Mesh dla odległych lokalizacji z natychmiastową komunikacją PTT i śledzeniem bezpieczeństwa pracowników.
nexa.solutions_hero.item_7.subtitle: Śledzenie floty GPS na żywo z inteligentnym przydzielaniem zadań i bezpieczną komunikacją między kierowcami i dyspozytorami.
nexa.solutions_hero.item_8.subtitle: Zaawansowana centrala PBX w chmurze z inteligentną analizą połączeń IVR i AI w celu oceny wydajności.

nexa.showcase.item_1.title: Jedna aplikacja. Cała komunikacja.
nexa.showcase.item_1.subtitle: Centrala chmurowa. Szyfrowane czaty. Naciśnij i mów. Wideo na żywo. Działa nawet bez internetu.
nexa.showcase.item_2.title: Działa bez Internetu
nexa.showcase.item_2.subtitle: Lokalna sieć Mesh poprzez Bluetooth. Komunikuj się w piwnicach, magazynach i odległych lokalizacjach. Nie potrzeba infrastruktury.
nexa.showcase.item_3.title: Bezpieczeństwo na poziomie wojskowym
nexa.showcase.item_3.subtitle: Maksymalna ochrona zbudowana na trzech warstwach szyfrowania. Infrastruktura o zerowym zaufaniu gwarantuje, że Twoja komunikacja i dane będą całkowicie odporne na ataki hakerskie.
nexa.showcase.item_4.title: System chmurowy PBX
nexa.showcase.item_4.subtitle: Jeden numer dla Twojej firmy dzięki inteligentnemu, wielojęzycznemu IVR. Automatyczna dystrybucja połączeń pomiędzy działami. Numery lokalne w ponad 7 krajach umożliwiające obecność na całym świecie.
nexa.showcase.item_5.title: Push-to-Talk — natychmiast
nexa.showcase.item_5.subtitle: Natychmiastowa komunikacja głosowa pomiędzy zespołami. Dedykowane kanały dla każdego działu. Szybciej niż połączenie, szybciej niż wiadomość.
nexa.showcase.item_6.title: Szyfrowanie typu end-to-end
nexa.showcase.item_6.subtitle: Każde połączenie, wiadomość i plik szyfrowane za pomocą AES-256. Nikt nie ma dostępu do Twoich danych – nawet my. Bezpieczeństwo na poziomie wojskowym.
nexa.showcase.item_7.title: Transmisja wideo na żywo
nexa.showcase.item_7.subtitle: Wideo na żywo z dowolnego miejsca. Zdalne monitorowanie obiektu. Udostępnianie ekranu podczas spotkań. Dokumentuj zdarzenia za pomocą dźwięku i obrazu.
nexa.showcase.item_8.title: System alarmowy SOS
nexa.showcase.item_8.subtitle: Przycisk awaryjny wysyła natychmiastowe powiadomienie za pomocą GPS do całego zespołu. 3 poziomy: pomoc, niebezpieczeństwo, medycyna. Automatyczna ochrona samotnego pracownika.

nexa.about.timeline_1.title: Założenie TexaCore
nexa.about.timeline_1.desc: Założona z wizją dostarczania inteligentnych, zintegrowanych rozwiązań komunikacyjnych dla przedsiębiorstw
nexa.about.timeline_2.title: Uruchomienie centrali Cloud PBX
nexa.about.timeline_2.desc: Uruchomienie pierwszego systemu chmurowego PBX w pełni zintegrowanego z ERP
nexa.about.timeline_3.title: Uruchomienie NexaLive PTT
nexa.about.timeline_3.desc: Wprowadzenie na rynek rewolucyjnej technologii Push-to-Talk z kompleksowym szyfrowaniem
nexa.about.timeline_4.title: Globalna ekspansja
nexa.about.timeline_4.desc: Rozszerzony, aby obsługiwać ponad 45 krajów z globalnie rozproszoną infrastrukturą
nexa.about.timeline_5.title: Sztuczna inteligencja NexaBrain
nexa.about.timeline_5.desc: Uruchomiono silnik AI do analizy połączeń i analityki biznesowej
nexa.about.timeline_6.title: NexaMesh i wideo PTT
nexa.about.timeline_6.desc: Pierwsza na świecie zdecentralizowana sieć mesh z funkcją Video PTT
nexa.about.timeline_7.title: Centrala chmurowa
nexa.about.timeline_7.desc: Inteligentna centrala PBX w chmurze z IVR, routingiem połączeń i integracją z ERP
nexa.about.timeline_8.title: Naciśnij i mów
nexa.about.timeline_8.desc: Natychmiastowa komunikacja za jednym dotknięciem z dźwiękiem HD i szyfrowaniem wojskowym
nexa.about.timeline_9.title: Szyfrowane wiadomości
nexa.about.timeline_9.desc: W pełni szyfrowane czaty z możliwością udostępniania plików i multimediów
nexa.about.timeline_10.title: NexaMesh
nexa.about.timeline_10.desc: Zdecentralizowana sieć działająca bez Internetu i wież komórkowych
nexa.about.timeline_11.title: Sztuczna inteligencja NexaBrain
nexa.about.timeline_11.desc: Sztuczna inteligencja do analizy połączeń i optymalizacji wydajności biznesowej
nexa.about.timeline_12.title: Zaawansowane zabezpieczenia
nexa.about.timeline_12.desc: Szyfrowanie AES-256 z architekturą zerowej wiedzy i wielowarstwową ochroną
nexa.about.timeline_13.title: Bezpieczeństwo przede wszystkim
nexa.about.timeline_13.desc: Całość budujemy w oparciu o kompleksowe szyfrowanie
nexa.about.timeline_14.title: Skoncentrowany na użytkowniku
nexa.about.timeline_14.desc: Płynny, prosty UX jest podstawą wszystkiego, co robimy
nexa.about.timeline_15.title: Ciągłe innowacje
nexa.about.timeline_15.desc: Zawsze jesteśmy w czołówce technologii komunikacyjnych
nexa.about.timeline_16.title: Myśl globalnie
nexa.about.timeline_16.desc: Rozwiązania zaprojektowane do pracy w dowolnym miejscu na świecie
nexa.about.timeline_17.title: Jeden zespół
nexa.about.timeline_17.desc: Pracujemy jako jedna rodzina, aby osiągnąć naszą wspólną wizję
nexa.about.timeline_18.title: Bezkompromisowa jakość
nexa.about.timeline_18.desc: We wszystkim, co dostarczamy, akceptujemy tylko to, co najlepsze
